events.title: A2 Dance Revolution — Salsa & Bachata Classes
events.description: Weekly salsa and bachata lessons at Cahoots. Level 1 & 3 run 6:30–7:45pm, Level 2 & 4 run 8–9:15pm. NY-style salsa (On2) and fusion bachata. Last week of the June session — check a2dancerevolution.com for July schedule.

events.title: A2 Dance Revolution — Salsa & Bachata Classes
events.description: Weekly salsa and bachata lessons at Cahoots. Level 1 & 3 run 6:30–7:45pm, Level 2 & 4 run 8–9:15pm. Last confirmed class of the June session — check a2dancerevolution.com for July dates.

events.title: Ian Flanigan (Artist Spotlight Series)
events.description: Ann Arbor's beloved folk/roots venue. Ian Flanigan performs as part of The Ark's Artist Spotlight Series. Donations benefit Food Gatherers food bank.

events.title: Top of the Park — Ann Arbor Summer Festival
events.description: Final week of Ann Arbor's beloved outdoor summer festival. Nightly live music on the Grove and Rackham stages, food vendors, movies, and family activities. Runs through June 28.

events.title: Esther Rose
events.description: New Orleans-rooted country and folk songwriter, known for warmly detailed storytelling. One of the most acclaimed voices in the Americana scene.

events.title: Handmade Moments
events.description: Live music at The Ark.

events.title: Sonic Lunch — Free Outdoor Concert Series
events.description: Ann Arbor's weekly lunchtime concert series with local and regional acts. Every Thursday through August. Bring a lunch or grab food from nearby spots.

events.title: Atomic Cafe
events.description: Live music night at the Blind Pig, Ann Arbor's legendary live music club on Washington St.

events.title: Gregory Stovetop
events.description: Live music at The Ark.

events.title: Todd Barry
events.description: Veteran New York stand-up comedian known for dry wit and deadpan delivery. A crowd favorite with over 30 years of touring experience.

events.title: The RFD Boys
events.description: Live music at The Ark.

events.title: Matt Watroba
events.description: Michigan folk singer and longtime host of Folks Like Us on Michigan Radio. A hometown favorite at The Ark.

events.title: Blind Pig Comedy — Monday Night
events.description: Weekly Monday comedy showcase at the Blind Pig. Rotating lineup of local and touring comics.

events.title: The Ark's Open Stage
events.description: The Ark's beloved open stage night — local and emerging musicians performing in a supportive, community-focused setting.

events.title: Holly Near & Jan Martinelli
events.description: Legendary folk and activist singer Holly Near performs with longtime collaborator Jan Martinelli. A rare intimate evening.

events.title: Sonic Lunch — Free Outdoor Concert Series
events.description: Weekly Thursday lunchtime concert. Different artist each week.

events.title: Davy Knowles
events.description: Isle of Man blues-rock guitarist and songwriter, known for his incendiary live performances and deeply soulful playing.

events.title: The Heavy Heavy
events.description: British indie rock duo blending 60s sunshine pop with psych-rock warmth. An energetic live act.

events.title: Sonic Lunch — Free Outdoor Concert Series
events.description: Weekly Thursday lunchtime concert. Different artist each week.

events.title: Howie Day
events.description: Singer-songwriter best known for "Collide," performing intimate acoustic and full-band sets.

events.title: Summer Carillon Concert Series
events.description: Free outdoor carillon concerts at the University of Michigan's Lurie Tower. Bring a blanket and enjoy the summer evening. Runs Mondays July 13–August 3.

events.title: Sonic Lunch — Free Outdoor Concert Series
events.description: Weekly Thursday lunchtime concert. On Art Fair week — great way to take a midday break from the fair.

events.title: Ann Arbor Art Fair 2026
events.description: One of the largest juried art fairs in the US — nearly 1,000 artists across 30 city blocks of downtown Ann Arbor. Three concurrent fairs: State Street, Original, and Summer Art Fair. Runs July 16–18 (Thu–Sat). Free to attend.
